rulings.Case Title: SERVICE EMPLOYEES INTERNATIONAL UNION, LOCAL 1000 et al VS. ARNOLD SCHWARZENEGGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Re Form Of Judgment (On Court'S Own Motion)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, September 24, 2009, line 9, Motion regarding form of judgment(on the court's own motion.) The court adopts SEIU's judgment. SEIU to prepare a writ. The Petition prayed for back pay with legal interest. Back pay is appropriate to make petitioners whole. Interest owed at legal rate since damages are certain by calculation. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandamus
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, September 24, 2009, line 8, PETITIONER JENNIFER DYER Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandamus. Petition denied without prejudice. Petitioner may bring the petition once the certified record is obtained and respondent is served with a copy. Hearing required to determine whether the suspension will be stayed. =(302/CWW)
